$comment: Season dossier pack S16, The Silver Jubilee (Golden Circus). Season-scoped coverage for the twenty-fifth running: heritage colours, the almanac read aloud, record-keeping, celebration conducted at full speed. Ids are stable rendezvous keys, never rename. Read-side only.

templates.headline: THE SILVER JUBILEE: twenty-five seasons, and the bunting is up
templates.deck: The circus honours itself the only way it knows: at speed
templates.summary: Season sixteen opens the championship's silver jubilee, a quarter-century celebrated flat out.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The bunting is up, the heritage paint is out, and the almanac men have been rehearsing all winter. The circus turns twenty-five seasons old this year, and it intends to celebrate the only way it has ever known: sixteen rounds, flat out, with the past waving from every grandstand.
sections.context: Every garage wears a piece of its own history this season, and the old champions take their bows between sessions. But the jubilee is no exhibition lap: the grid has never been tighter, and the big board keeps score the way it always has. {pool:swBoard}
sections.close: A quarter-century of noise behind it, and the loudest season may be the one just starting.

templates.headline: {subject} wins[[?venue: at {venue}]], a victory for the almanac
templates.deck: The jubilee year files another page

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} In a season where every round is staged as history, {subject} went and made some. The almanac will file this one the way it files all the genuine articles: date, circuit, name, no asterisk. {pool:swCrowd}

templates.headline: {subject} on the podium[[?venue: at {venue}]], under twenty-five years of flags
templates.deck: A celebration the record book countersigns

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} {subject} climbed the rostrum beneath the whole wardrobe of jubilee flags, and the champagne counted double: once for the day, once for the anniversary that framed it. {pool:swCrowd}

templates.headline: POLE for {subject}[[?venue: at {venue}]], a lap for the record board

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The silver jubilee keeps count of everything, and today it counts {subject} fastest of all. Pole in the anniversary year goes into the ledger beside twenty-five seasons of the quickest men the circus has produced. {pool:swBoard}
sections.close: The record board keeps the lap forever. Tomorrow's race merely keeps the points.

templates.headline: {subject} leads the silver jubilee: the standard flies
templates.deck: Top of the board in the year the circus measures itself
templates.summary: {subject} took the championship lead in season sixteen.

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} Every jubilee needs a standard-bearer, and the big board has chosen: {subject} leads the twenty-fifth running. The whole anniversary now has a name to measure itself against. {pool:swBoard}
sections.close: Twenty-five seasons of champions know what this position costs. The meter is running.

templates.headline: {subject} parks it[[?venue: at {venue}]], heritage postponed
templates.deck: The almanac's only entry today is a tow truck

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The jubilee year has a cruel sense of occasion: {subject}'s machine chose the anniversary spotlight to go silent[[?venue: at {venue}]]. The heritage paint survived unmarked, which is all the consolation on offer tonight. {pool:wrenchNote}
sections.context: The crew works under lamps older than some of the mechanics. {pool:swLadder}
sections.close: The board logs a stoppage. The garage logs a promise.

templates.headline: {subject} in the barriers[[?venue: at {venue}]], no parade for this one
templates.deck: The jubilee's armco takes its place in the records too

sections.lead: {pool:dateline} The anniversary season archives everything, including the afternoons its participants would rather lose. {subject} met the barriers[[?venue: at {venue}]] and became a footnote the driver will not be framing. Unhurt, unamused, and already thinking about the next round. {pool:swCrowd}
sections.close: Twenty-five seasons have seen worse and filed it the same way. The climb resumes.
